description: Wong Kar Wai Fallen Angels neo-noir style (FLUX.1-dev + LoRA)

model._hint: Transformer: city96/FLUX.1-dev-gguf (flux1-dev-Q8_0.gguf, ~12 GB). Pipeline components: black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-dev (gated — HF token required). LoRA: je-suis-tm/wong_kar_wai_fallen_angels_lora_flux (pytorch_lora_weights.safetensors). Q8_0 keeps near-bfloat16 quality with trivial dequantisation overhead on MPS. sequential_cpu_offload disabled (incompatible with GGUF). LoRA applied via set_adapters() (unfused — required for GGUF).

lora._hint: 0.9 default. Range: 0.7–1.0. Lower values blend toward base FLUX aesthetics. Trigger word 'WKW style' must appear in the prompt.

generation._hint: 28 steps (quality/speed sweet spot per model card — author recommends 28–50). cfg_scale 3.5–4.0 per model card. Wider aspect ratios (1456×816) work well for cinematic compositions. FLUX.1-dev uses CFG guidance — do NOT set cfg_scale to 0.

system._hint: ~12 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: disabled (incompatible with GGUF)

notes.about: Generates images in the bold neo-noir visual style of Wong Kar Wai's 1995 film 'Fallen Angels': extreme wide-angle compositions, tilted/Dutch angles, vivid neon colour grading, rain-slicked city streets, moody tunnels, and a surreal cinematic atmosphere. Trained on stills from the film using DreamBooth LoRA on FLUX.1-dev.
notes.prompt_guide: TRIGGER WORD: always include 'WKW style' at the start of the prompt. Effective scene elements: neon lights, rain-slicked streets, subway trains, dimly lit tunnels with green/red accent lights, close-ups of faces with bangs, Dutch/tilted camera angles. Use 'tilted view' or 'tilted sideview' to emphasise the signature camera angle. Long, descriptive cinematic prompts work best — describe clothing, light source, mood, and background. Examples: 'WKW style, tilted view of a woman with long dark hair standing in a neon-lit subway station, rain outside the windows, moody atmosphere', 'WKW style, closeup of a man in a black jacket, bathed in green neon light, shadowy hallway, contemplative expression', 'WKW style, rain-slicked city street at night, a woman in a white blouse, neon reflections on wet pavement'.
notes.warnings: FLUX.1-dev is a gated model — a HuggingFace token with access to black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-dev is required. The LoRA was trained at 36 GB VRAM; this config uses Q8_0 GGUF to fit within 16 GB MPS. cpu_offload must remain false (incompatible with GGUF).
